# Support

Thanks for using the CDK NAG Validator extension! Here's how to get help:

## 📖 Documentation

- [README](../README.md) — installation, configuration, and usage
- [CHANGELOG](../CHANGELOG.md) — what changed in each release

## 🐛 Found a bug?

Open a [bug report](https://github.com/alphacrack/cdk-nag-extension/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml). Please include your extension, VS Code, and Node.js versions plus reproduction steps.

## 💡 Have an idea?

Open a [feature request](https://github.com/alphacrack/cdk-nag-extension/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml). Check [BACKLOG.md](../BACKLOG.md) first — it may already be planned.

## 🔒 Security issues

**Never open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.** Follow the process in [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).

## ❓ Questions about cdk-nag rules

Questions about specific NAG rules (e.g. "why does AwsSolutions-S1 fire?") belong in the upstream [cdk-nag project](https://github.com/cdklabs/cdk-nag).
